race.description: Cwnet P/L Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Hcp
race.comment: TILLMAN (8) doesn't win out of turn but hasn't been beaten far in his last two, only missing by a head last time at Queanbeyan over a similar trip. Boudvillain sticking is a good push for his chances. MISSILE DEFENCE (3) failed to get involved last start on a tricky Hawkesbury track but had been ticking along nicely prior, bettering TILLMAN two back at Queanbeyan. Can bounce back sharply here but will likely drift back from his draw. MRS BULL (1) backs up immediately after a quite effort yesterday at Quirindi. Was quietly ridden throughout but warmed nicely late. Rare that you see this quick of a turnaround. Have to keep onside. GREEN PINEAPPLE (4) has mixed his form since resuming but can cause a late scare if the tempo is genuine.
